Article.ArticleTitle: The association between executive function and eye-hand coordination in older adults: the partial mediation of attention, global cognition, and muscle strength.

Grant.Agency: the Natural Science Foundation of Fujian Province
the Rehabilitation Technology Innovation Center by Joint Collaboration of Ministry of Education and Fujian Province, Fujian University of Traditional Chinese Medicine
the Young Scientific and Technological Innovative Talents Training Project of Fujian University of Traditional Chinese Medicine
Major Scientific and Technological Innovative Talents Training Project of Fujian University of Traditional Chinese Medicine

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: Declarations. Ethics approval and consent to participate: This study follows the principles of Helsinki Declaration and has been approved by the Ethics Review Committee of Rehabilitation Hospital Affiliated to Fujian University of Traditional Chinese Medicine (No.2023KY-013–02). Before participating, all participants were fully informed about the study and provided written informed consent prior to participation. Participants had the right to withdraw at any time. Consent for publication: Not applicable. Competing interests: The authors declare no competing interests.
